name: Shoucheng Holdings Limited
summary: Shoucheng Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the management and operation of car parking assets. It is also involved in the management of private funds; and infrastructure and real estate funds. The company was formerly known as Shougang Concord International Enterprises Company Limited and changed its name to Shoucheng Holdings Limited in May 2020. Shoucheng Holdings Limited is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
